message:
fix(types): add missing agent roles to prompts.ts and fix test type errors

- Add devils_advocate, experiment_designer, statistician, brenner_channeler,
  and synthesis roles to ROLE_LABELS in prompts.ts
- Update prompts.test.ts with complete OperatorSelection objects
- Update session-kickoff.test.ts with complete OperatorSelection objects
- Fix ExclusionTestCategory in what-if.test.ts (observation → natural_experiment)
- Fix ExclusionTestCategory in WhatIfSimulator.test.tsx

All affected tests pass after these fixes.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
